verses.text: Topa phat un. I Pasian' inn huangsung, Topa' innsunga a ding, Topa' nasemte aw, Topa phat un; ama min phat un
Topa phat un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa hoih hi. Ama min phatna la sak un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah phatnophuai hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama-a' dingin Jakob teel a, ama neihsa dingin Israel teel khinta hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa lian hi, ci-in ka thei a, eite' Topa pen pasian dang khempeuh sangin a lianzaw hi
Vantung leh leitung, tuipi leh a thukna sung khempeuhah Topa in ama ut peuhpeuh a bawl hi
Amah in leimong panin meiipi kaisakin, guahzukna dingin khuaphialepte bawl a, a huihkua panin huih a pusuaksak hi
Amah in Egypt gamsungah mihing ganhing tacil khempeuh a vatmai hi
Egypt aw, nangma sungah lim leh na lamdangte, Faro leh a nasem khempeuhte gimpiakna-in a lak hi
Minam tampite vatmai-in kumpi vangliante that a
Amor kumpipa Sihon, Bashan kumpipa Og leh Kanaan kumpite a that hi
Amau' leitang khempeuh, ama mi Israel-te' luah dingin a piakhia hi
Topa aw, nangma min kip tawntung hi. Topa aw, na minthan'na khang tawntungin a kip hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama mite' thu khenin, ama nasemte tungah hehpihna a nei ding hi
Minam dangte' pasian-te pen mihingte' khut tawh a kibawl, ngun leh kham ahi hi
Amaute in kam nei napi, pau theilo uh hi. Amaute in mit nei napi, khua mu theilo uh hi
Amaute in bil nei napi, khua za theilo uh hi. Amaute' kamsungah naksuk naktoh theihna neilo uh hi
Milim a bawl mite pen milim mah bangsak in. Milim a muang khempeuhte zong tua milimte mah bangsak in
Israel mite aw, Topa phat un. Aaron' innkuante aw, Topa phat un
Levi mite aw, Topa phat un. Topa a zahtakte aw, Topa phat un
Jerusalem inn-a a nei, Zion-a om Topa in thupha ngah ta hen. Topa phat un.
